summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HubSpoke employee scheduling application. Backend API tests achieved 100% success rate (17/17 tests passed). Frontend UI tests successfully validated all core functionality including authentication, navigation, CRUD operations, calendar views, and schedule creation with drive time blocks.

design_issues.issue: Google Maps API key not properly configured - shows fallback message instead of actual map
design_issues.note: This is expected behavior when API key is not configured. Fallback UI works correctly.

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display (today: 0, schedules: 0, employees: 1, locations: 5)
Sidebar navigation to all pages (Dashboard, Calendar, Map View, Locations, Employees)
Location management - 5 seeded Iowa locations verified (Oskaloosa, Grinnell, Fort Dodge, Carroll, Marshalltown)
Location CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Schedule creation with automatic drive time calculation
Calendar view switching (Day, Week, Month views)
Schedule display on calendar with drive time blocks
Town-to-town warning system for multiple locations same day
Map view with fallback for missing API key
All backend API endpoints (auth, dashboard, locations, employees, schedules)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor API key configuration issue)
